nasb.text: He was despised and forsaken of men, A man of sorrows and acquainted with grief; And like one from whom men hide their face He was despised, and we did not esteem Him.

esv.text: He was despised and rejected by men, a man of sorrows and acquainted with grief; and as one from whom men hide their faces he was despised, and we esteemed him not.

cnv.text: 他被藐視，被人拒絕， 是個多受痛苦，熟悉病患的人。 他像個被人掩面不看的人一樣； 他被藐視，我們也不重視他。

ccb.text: 祂被藐视，遭人厌弃， 饱受痛苦，历尽忧患。 人们对祂不屑一顾， 我们也不尊重祂。

csbs.text: 他被藐视、遭人厌弃， 是个受痛苦、知忧患的人； 他像一个被人掩面不看的人， 他被藐视，连我们也不尊重他。
